para_trans: The amount for Nandurbar Municipal Council, Dist. Nandurbar under Head of Accounts (4217 0603) for the year 2024-25 is Rs. 9.50 crore (purse)
Government Correctional Certificate No: - NABARD-2024 / Q.No.238 (47) / NABARD-16 (E-823509)
(1) Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No: - NABARD-2024 / P.No.238 (47) / NABARD-16, (E-823509) dated 23rd August, 2024.
Municipal councils in the state are given special grants for "specialty" work. under reference
No. (1) If the work at No. 2, 3 and 6 of the Government Decision herein is not ordered to be commenced, and
with this in lieu of cancelling the said works subject to the condition that there is a time limit for the expenditure of funds.
The works in the attached returns are being approved through a government certificate.
2. Reference No. (1) The other terms and conditions of the Government decision herein shall continue.
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
